hero.title: Ignacio Breñas Muñoz
hero.subtitle: Web Application Developer & Junior IT Technician

about.title: About Me
about.p1: I am a Higher Degree student in Web Application Development, with a solid technical foundation acquired through both my academic training and practical experiences.
about.p2: I consider myself a proactive, decisive person with a great capacity for adaptation, always ready to take on new challenges and learn from them. I am interested in participating in real and dynamic projects to combine classroom learning with business experience.

experience.title: Professional Experience
soterguard_tasks: Web and Backend Development: Integration of JavaScript/TypeScript with modern frameworks (React, Vue.js) and construction of robust services and APIs using Java and Spring, as well as PHP environments (Laravel, Symfony), creating solutions and management tools aimed at satisfying the specific requirements of each client.

Internal Tools Development: Collaboration in the design and maintenance of custom software for cyber defense and IT systems management using C, C++, Go, and Rust, ensuring the protection and efficiency of client environments.
Data Management: Design and optimization of queries in PostgreSQL environments, structuring information and databases based on the objectives and operational needs of end users.
Software Security: Application of secure coding methodologies for data validation and proactive mitigation of vulnerabilities, ensuring the maximum integrity of solutions delivered to the client.
Deployment and Monitoring: Implementation of automation and deployment solutions within the SoterVI platform, adapting the infrastructure to real demand and project needs.
Systems Administration: Management of complex virtualized environments, including virtual machines, containers, and Kubernetes clusters, to offer stable and scalable custom architectures.

Methodology and Tools: Work under Agile methodology, version control with Git/Fork, and development in WSL/LXC environments, using corporate tools, Teams, and Outlook for daily coordination and ensuring each deliverable perfectly aligns with client expectations.
experience.vimtech_l1: Specialization in IT services and repair of Apple devices.
experience.vimtech_l2: Diagnostics, maintenance, installation of operating systems, and replacement of components.
experience.vimtech_l3: Personalized advice with customized technological solutions.
